name: TOP_TARGETPAIR_BY_ASSIGNEE
description: Top target pair by patent count for one assignee.
cypher: MATCH (a:Assignee {name:$assignee})<-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]-(p:Patent)-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]->(tp:TargetPair) WITH a.name AS assignee, tp.name AS target_pair, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count ORDER BY patent_count DESC, target_pair RETURN assignee, target_pair, patent_count LIMIT 1;
